title: AGY-203: Interactive Workspaces (L200)
author: tridorian Labs & Google Cloud
description: Welcome to AGY-203: Interactive Workspaces! This elective course is designed for Writers, Developers, and Editor Enthusiasts who want to master synchronous side-by-side co-authoring, workspace markdown navigation, and live text rewriting or code refactoring inside antigravity-ide. Learners will acquire hands-on experience using the agentic sidecar, managing workspace security boundaries, and collaborating with autonomous AI agents to construct high-quality technical documentation and codebases.

features.title: Side-by-Side Co-Authoring
features.description: Work synchronously with AI agents in a split-editor view to draft documents, specs, and proposals in real-time.

features.title: Markdown Workspace Navigation
features.description: Explore and query large document directories using semantic index searches and folder boundaries.

features.title: Live Refactoring & Rewriting
features.description: Execute precision edits, code refactoring, and text rewriting directly inside active files with minimum-diff logic.
